rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior customer satisfaction–stock return work by introducing an investor-mediated mechanism (short interest), and the cited 2010 JMKR paper is itself a mechanism study linking customer satisfaction to firm value via analyst recommendations (with abnormal return/risk outcomes). Given this strong conceptual overlap in constructs and mediation framing—and an exact DOI match in the reference metadata—this is likely more than an incidental background mention.
